title: create: domestics
description: create with a bunch of farming, pet mods, and a world gen overhaul
body:
World generation overhaul with tectonic, terralith, yungs better structure mod set, and a bunch of other structure mods
Farming expansion with Farmers Delight, Vinery, Brewery,  critters and companions, alex's mobs, alexsdelight [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight] and aquaculture2 [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture])aquaculturedelight[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight]
Travel better with block runner, Immersive aircraft, and small ships 
Build with create, Macaws mods, Architectury & Carpentry, and many ideas doors
